description: Style NoteWith its unusual colour story and chic styling this wallet from baggit easily makes it into our wishlist this Summer. Carry it with western and ethnic outfits to infuse a touch of  glamour to your ensemble. Its multiple pockets and slots help you stay organised- in style. Product DetailsThree fold purple textured wallet with tab and press button closureTop stitched slot seams on the frontOnce opened buttoned flap with eight credit card slots, one photo id card holder and a slip pocket on one side; one pocket with buttoned flap and three slip pocket on the other sideZippered pocket at backMaterials and CareSyntheticWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 11 cmWidth: 20 cm
